policy: Exact engine versions are selected and locked by each package implementation PR; major or engine changes require a renewed review and conformance evidence.

hosts.security_boundary: No WASI linkage; interpreter execution; bounded bridge memory and serialized calls

hosts.supported_hosts: Android/JVM versions declared and tested by #648
hosts.security_boundary: Pure JVM with no JNI; no WASI linkage; interpreter and bounded bridge memory

hosts.supported_hosts: Windows targets declared and tested by #649
hosts.security_boundary: No WASI linkage; fuel/epoch interruption and bounded bridge memory
